article_meta.title: Trump strategy document revives Monroe Doctrine, slams EuropeBy Idrees Ali, Matt Spetalnick and James MackenzieDecember

reasoning: Wrongly labels a Lean Left article as Center with very high confidence, ignores clear left-leaning authorial phrases (e.g., 'slams Europe,' 'troubled history of military interventions,' 'used increasingly racist rhetoric'), and includes attribution-violating indicators ('critics have said,' 'Some European commentators said').

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article shows left-leaning author framing; model chose Center, which is wrong direction for a clearly non-neutral piece.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.9 is severely overconfident given evident directional signals contradicting a Center rating.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Two key indicators rely on attributed perspectives (critics/commentators), violating the attribution rule; others are author prose but miss the strongest authorial signals.
